M8/#624, COMM. SUE KAPLAN, CSR R BARULICH, CLK H HAMILTON 1400: CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL STEPHEN LIGHTFOOT WITH DON GRENDAHL. DEFENDANTS PRESENT WITH COUNSEL THOMAS DROHAN. SETTLED FOR DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF IN EXCHANGE FOR DEFENDANT'S WAIVER OF AFFIRMATIVE CLAIMS AND ALL MATTERS ARISING OUT OF SERVICE OF 30 DAY NOTICE, FILING OF ACTION, AND POSSESSION. DEFENDANTS WILL TENDER RENT DUE SINCE OCTOBER/NOVEMBER 1997. ON 6-1-98, PLAINTIFF WILL SERVE DEFENDANTS WITH A NOTICE OF INCREASE OF 11-15%. DEFENDANTS AGREE INCREASE NOT RETALIATORY. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE DOCUMENT SETTING FORTH SETTLEMENT TERMS. DEFENDANTS WAIVE CLAIMS PER CC1542. EACH SIDE BEAR OWN COSTS & FEES.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-20-1998 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
